scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names server,client "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:lan: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names server,client "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client -- --host"
scripts.test: npm run test -w server && npm run typecheck -w client && npm run test -w worker
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client && npm run typecheck -w worker
scripts.lint:complexity: npm run lint:complexity -w server && npm run lint:complexity -w client && npm run lint:complexity -w worker && npm run lint:complexity -w shared
